understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to move selectable pieces onto all '+' goal tiles simultaneously. I was progressing through levels, and this run ended after I explored some of the level's mechanics without yet placing pieces on goals.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses pixel coordinates on a grid with 3-pixel cells. Pieces are selectable; CLICK switches control to another selectable at given coordinates. MOVE actions attempt to shift the selected piece in a direction, but walls or blocks can block movement. Some objects may be pushable, though none were pushed here. The semantic_grid shows layout with P for player, S for selectables, B for blocks, # for walls, + for goals. Movement is not always blocked even when there's an adjacent object, but I observed actual blocks at certain positions.
